MaturityLevel.description:
The four maturity levels (Methodology §3.1).

The numeric ``index`` is for computation only; clients see the label. These four indices
are the ONLY legal subcomponent indices — any other value is a contract violation, not a
datum to clamp or round (ADR-0001 §1).
MaturityLevel.title: MaturityLevel

RatingEntry.description: One assessor's rating of one vignette anchor.
RatingEntry.title: RatingEntry

description:
One assessor's blind rating set for a session. `owner_consultant_id` is the assessor. Locked
on submit; invisible to co-raters (and to the results) until the session closes.

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id

title: CalibrationRating
